posts.author: michaelabi (Michael Bernstein)
posts.cookedHtml:
Description

It would be great to have intermediate board permissions like “Manager” who can see all items but have restricted access. Board owners can see and do everything but if members can only see/interact with items they are tagged on then a user who is managing everything but shouldn’t be able to edit everything needs to be in a separate people column of every item. It seems like a third intermediate option would be helpful.

What are you trying to achieve

An intermediate level permission on boards to allow intermediate users to have higher permissions than members, but not as broad as board owners
